Order operations system context

A warehouse analyst enters through the operations portal. Identity remains external, while orders, inventory events, notifications, and the operational store stay inside explicit system relationships.

RequestIdentityEventData write
01 · Actor to entry
Warehouse analyst → Operations portal · request.
02 · Entry to core
Operations portal → Order service · request.
03 · Trust boundary
Operations portal → Identity provider · identity validation.
04 · External event
Order service → Notification service · completion event.
05 · Owned data
Order service → Operations store · state write.
